transcript: Speaker A: ओए, इधर आ। नाम बता अपना। [Hey, come here. Tell me your name.] Speaker B: सूरज कुमार। [Suraj Kumar.] Speaker A: ऐसे नहीं, अंग्रेजी में अच्छे से। [Not like that, properly in English.] Speaker B: आई... मी... सूरज कुमार। [I... me... Suraj Kumar.] Speaker C: हाँ हाँ, कहाँ से हो? [Yeah yeah, where are you from?] Speaker B: विलेज फ्रॉम... उधर... उत्तर प्रदेश। [Village from... there... Uttar Pradesh.] Speaker C: हॉबीज़ क्या हैं तुम्हारी? [What are your hobbies?] Speaker B: हॉबीज़ क्या? [Hobbies what?] Speaker A: क्या करना पसंद है? [What do you like to do?] Speaker B: अच्छा... ओ... अम... क्रिकेट, प्ले, मी... महेंद्र सिंह धोनी... हेलीकॉप्टर शॉट। [Oh... oh... um... cricket, play, me... Mahendra Singh Dhoni... helicopter shot.] Speaker A: सब मज़ाक उड़ाएंगे तुम्हारा। [Everyone will make fun of you.] Speaker B: क्यों भैया? मैंने सब कुछ सही बताया ना? [Why brother? I told everything correctly, right?] Speaker C: ऐसे लड़खड़ा के अंग्रेजी बोलोगे, दिल्ली में तुम्हारे हाई-फाई कॉलेज के लोग सब हसेंगे तुमपे। [If you speak English haltingly like this, everyone at your high-fi college in Delhi will laugh at you.] Speaker B: पर... एक महीने में मैं अंग्रेजी कैसे प्रैक्टिस कर सकता हूँ? [But... how can I practice English in a month?] Speaker A: मेरे भैया मुंबई गए थे। उन्होंने एक ऐप के साथ इंग्लिश सीखा। [My brother went to Mumbai. He learned English with an app.] Speaker C: SpeakX. [SpeakX.] Speaker A: SpeakX. उसकी एआई टीचर, सिया, अच्छे से समझाती है। उसके साथ बातचीत करके आप इंग्लिश सीख जाओगे। [SpeakX. Its AI teacher, Sia, explains very well. By talking with her, you will learn English.] Speaker B: ये तो अच्छी बात है। मैं कोशिश करता हूँ। थैंक यू भैया। [That's a good thing. I will try. Thank you brother.] Speaker B: हाय भैया। [Hi brother.] Speaker A: ओ, सूरज। [Oh, Suraj.] Speaker C: अरे सूरज, तैयारी हो गई? [Hey Suraj, is the preparation done?] Speaker B: हाँ हो गया भैया। My name is Suraj Kumar. I came from Uttar Pradesh. I love playing cricket. And I can do helicopter shot like MS Dhoni. [Yes, it's done brother. My name is Suraj Kumar. I came from Uttar Pradesh. I love playing cricket. And I can do helicopter shot like MS Dhoni.] Speaker A: वाह यार! क्या कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ अंग्रेजी बोली है तुमने। जाओ दिल्ली पे छा जाओ। [Wow man! What confidence you spoke English with. Go and shine in Delhi.] Speaker C: जाओ यार। [Go, man.] Speaker B: थैंक यू भैया, थैंक यू। [Thank you brother, thank you.] Speaker D: SpeakX की AI टीचर सिया के साथ आप भी अपनी इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग में कॉन्फिडेंस और फ्लूएंसी डेवलप कर सकते हैं। आपको मिलेगी डेली गाइडेंस, रियल-टाइम फीडबैक और एक जजमेंट-फ्री एनवायरनमेंट 24/7। जब चाहे, जहाँ चाहे। तो आज ही डाउनलोड करिए SpeakX और अपने सपनों को करिए हासिल। [With SpeakX's AI teacher Sia, you too can develop confidence and fluency in your English speaking. You will get daily guidance, real-time feedback, and a judgment-free environment 24/7. Whenever you want, wherever you want. So download SpeakX today and achieve your dreams.]
on_screen_text: HEY, COME HERE. SURAJ KUMAR. SAY IT PROPERLY IN ENGLISH. I... ME... SURAJ KUMAR. WHERE ARE YOU FROM? VILLAGE FROM... THERE... UTTAR PRADESH. WHAT ARE YOUR HOBBIES? HOBBIES... WHAT DO YOU LIKE TO DO? OH... CRICKET, PLAY, ME... MAHINDRA SINGH DHONI... HELICOPTER SHOT. EVERYONE WILL MAKE FUN OF YOU. WHY, BROTHER? I TOLD YOU EVERYTHING CORRECTLY, DIDN'T I? IF YOU SPEAK ENGLISH SO FLUENTLY, EVERYONE FROM YOUR HI-FI COLLEGE IN DELHI WILL LAUGH AT YOU. BUT... HOW CAN I PRACTICE ENGLISH IN A MONTH? MY BROTHER WENT TO MUMBAI. HE LEARNED ENGLISH WITH AN APP. SPEAKX. HIS AI TEACHER, SIA, TEACHES HIM WELL. YOU WILL LEARN ENGLISH BY TALKING TO HER. THAT'S GOOD. I'LL TRY. THANK YOU, BROTHER. HI, BROTHER. OH, SURAJ. HEY, SURAJ. YES, BROTHER. MY NAME IS SURAJ KUMAR. I CAME FROM UTTAR PRADESH. I LOVE PLAYING CRICKET. AND I CAN DO HELICOPTER SHOT LIKE MS. WOW, MAN. YOU SPOKE ENGLISH SO CONFIDENTLY. THANK YOU, BROTHER. THANK YOU. Meet SIA Your personal AI Teacher. Everyday Life: Daily English. Listen and Select. Select the word you hear. Congratulations! You have successfully completed this Lesson. SpeakX.
summary: A young man is warned by his friends that his poor English will lead to embarrassment at his new college in Delhi. They recommend the SpeakX app, which features an AI teacher named Sia to help him practice speaking. After using the app, he speaks English confidently and fluently, prompting a call to action to download SpeakX.
